title: Kitchen Manipulation
description: Record and annotate robotics manipulation video data for training embodied AI agents. Contributors upload kitchen task demonstration videos, which are processed by our Vision Engine for pre-labeling, then reviewed and annotated by human contributors.

tasks.title: Upload kitchen task video
tasks.description: Record a 30–120s video of kitchen manipulation (folding, packing, pick-and-place) and upload with detection preset.

tasks.title: Vision Engine pre-labeling
tasks.description: YOLO person detection, optical flow, pose estimation, temporal segmentation.

tasks.title: Cull review + action annotation
tasks.description: Review Vision Engine segments (keep/cull), fine-cut action boundaries, assign labels (fold_box, fold_textile, packing, pick_place), write language instructions.

tasks.title: Quality validation
tasks.description: Annotation completeness, spatial coverage, language quality, label consistency scoring.
